# Templates

Reusable templates for project deliverables. These provide consistent structure across all student work — the same way investment banks and consulting firms maintain firm-wide templates for models, memos, and pitch materials.

## Available templates

| Template | Used in | Purpose |
|----------|---------|---------|
| [`memo-template.md`](memo-template.md) | Stage 2 | Executive memo structure: summary, background, findings, recommendations |
| [`spec-template.md`](spec-template.md) | Stage 4 | Technical specification structure: scope, inputs, formulas, outputs, validation |

## How to use

1. Copy the template to the appropriate directory (e.g., `docs/memos/` or `docs/specs/`)
2. Rename following the naming convention: `[lastname]-[stage]-[description].md`
3. Fill in each section — delete placeholder text, keep the headings
4. Templates are starting points, not constraints. Add sections if your analysis requires them.
